reason: Types intentionally outside the normal WinMD-covered gate. These remain hand-written in com_native.zig.

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.hosting.h), not in WinMD

types.name: IWindowNative
types.why: C++ interop header, COM/native bridge, not normal WinRT projection

types.name: IApplicationAbi
types.why: Internal ABI for Application.Resources access, not a public WinMD type

types.name: IVector
types.why: Windows.Foundation.Collections.IVector<IInspectable> — in Windows.Foundation.winmd, not Microsoft.UI.Xaml.winmd. Cross-module reference support needed first.

types.name: IPropertyValue
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValue — in system WinMD, not Microsoft.UI.Xaml.winmd

types.name: IPropertyValueStatics
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValueStatics — in system WinMD, not Microsoft.UI.Xaml.winmd

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative2
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.media.dxinterop.h), not in WinMD. Extended native swap chain interface.

types.name: IWindow2
types.why: Present in WinMD but numbered extension interface (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.IWindow2). Bindgen does not yet produce correct vtable offset for extension interfaces; keep hand-written until #114+.

types.name: ITabView2
types.why: Present in WinMD but numbered extension interface (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Controls.ITabView2). Bindgen does not yet produce correct vtable offset for extension interfaces; keep hand-written until #114+.

types.name: IFrameworkElement2
types.why: Present in WinMD but numbered extension interface (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.IFrameworkElement2). Bindgen does not yet produce correct vtable offset for extension interfaces; keep hand-written until #114+.

types.name: IPanel2
types.why: Present in WinMD but numbered extension interface (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Controls.IPanel2). Bindgen does not yet produce correct vtable offset for extension interfaces; keep hand-written until #114+.
